title: C20-01: pixel_pitch crash guard, Sony FX naming, merge field preservation

stories.title: Fix pixel_pitch() crash on zero/negative mpix
acceptanceCriteria: Test added for zero and negative mpix in test_parsers_offline.py
All 105+ existing gate tests still pass

stories.title: Fix Sony FX series naming in _parse_camera_name
acceptanceCriteria: _parse_camera_name({'Model Name': 'Sony FX3'}, '...sony-fx3-review/specifications/') returns 'Sony FX3' not 'Sony Fx3'
Existing Sony ZV-E10 naming test still passes
Existing Sony A7 IV naming test still passes
Test added for Sony FX naming in test_parsers_offline.py

stories.title: Add merge field preservation for type/size/pitch
acceptanceCriteria: merge_camera_data preserves type from existing when new has type=None
merge_camera_data preserves size from existing when new has size=None
merge_camera_data preserves pitch from existing when new has pitch=None
merge_camera_data still overwrites existing fields when new has non-None values
Test added for type/size/pitch preservation in test_parsers_offline.py
